creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
jadawin     2011-04-05 14:03:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt             Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/p5-Net-SNMP-Util Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module, Net::SNMP::Util, gives you functions of SNMP getting
  operation interfaces using Net::SNMP communicating with multiple
  hosts and multi-OIDs.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Net-SNMP-Util/
  
  PR:             ports/156021
  Submitted by:   Hsin-Han You <hhyou at cs.nctu.edu.tw>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.238     +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/net-mgmt/p5-Net-SNMP-Util/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/net-mgmt/p5-Net-SNMP-Util/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/net-mgmt/p5-Net-SNMP-Util/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +12 -0     ports/net-mgmt/p5-Net-SNMP-Util/pkg-plist (new)
